summary: Verified modular routes refactoring - all 47 backend API tests pass (100%). Tested 15 critical flows: auth, user dashboard, wallet, referrals, mining, admin dashboard/users/orders/products/withdrawals. Frontend loads correctly with landing page, login, and registration pages all functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Route refactoring successful - all routes from server.py moved to modular files in /app/backend/routes/ work correctly
All modular route files properly initialize with set_db() and set_helpers() patterns
Frontend uses PIN-based authentication (6-digit PIN) instead of traditional passwords
Admin dashboard, users, orders, products, and withdrawals routes all functioning correctly
Caching implemented in admin_dashboard.py, admin_orders.py, admin_withdrawals.py

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All pages load correctly (landing, login, register)

seed_data_creation: None required - used existing production data
context_for_next_testing_agent:
Modular routes refactoring fully verified in iteration 52. All 15 requested critical flows tested:

1. User Registration - POST /api/auth/register/simple ✅
2. User Login - POST /api/auth/login ✅
3. User Dashboard - GET /api/user/dashboard/{uid} ✅
4. Mining Start - POST /api/mining/start ✅
5. Mining Collect - POST /api/mining/collect ✅
6. Wallet Balance - GET /api/wallet/{uid} ✅
7. Wallet Transactions - GET /api/wallet/transactions/{uid} ✅
8. Referral System - GET /api/referral/* ✅
9. Admin Dashboard KPIs - GET /api/admin/dashboard-all, /api/admin/stats ✅
10. Admin Users List - GET /api/admin/users ✅
11. Admin Orders Stats - GET /api/admin/orders/stats ✅
12. Admin Withdrawals Pending - GET /api/admin/withdrawals/pending-count ✅
13. Products List - GET /api/admin/products ✅
14. Health Check - GET /api/health ✅
15. Cache Stats - GET /api/cache/stats ✅

Route modules tested:
- auth.py: Registration, login, auth-type check, forgot password
- users.py: User profile, dashboard, stats, birthday check
- wallet.py: Balance, transactions, withdrawals
- referral.py: Code, list, stats, multi-level stats
- admin_dashboard.py: Debug stats, comprehensive stats, charts
- admin_users.py: User list, stats
- admin_orders.py: Orders list, stats
- admin_products.py: Products CRUD, marketplace settings
- admin_withdrawals.py: Pending count, withdrawals list

frontend_tests.landing_page: PASS - Shows PARAS REWARD branding, stats (204+ members, 58K+ points distributed)
frontend_tests.login_page: PASS - Two-step login (email first, then PIN)
frontend_tests.register_page: PASS - Shows Full Name, Mobile, Email, 6-digit PIN, Referral Code fields
